Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sage of the Silver Heart]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Sage of the Silver Heart is a title held by Akura Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Sage of Silver Heart is a woman with deep purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Sage of Silver Heart looks less than twenty years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Charity is the Sage of the Silver Heart.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart is a member of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart is a female Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart had taken hostile notice of Kiro.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart has restricted bloodshed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart is a character who can fade into shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart would be unhappy with Daji for killing an Akura clan member.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart selected Lindon to represent the Akura family in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Sage of Silver Heart's technique caused the unnatural terror.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart is capable of weaving space and shadow to create portals.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Cracks are spreading within the Sage of the Silver Heart.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
